title: Velvety Herbal Collards Stir-fry
description: A date-night Brazilian-inspired dish featuring collards cooked with a blend of herbal flavors and seasoned with high-protein-friendly proteins for added nutrition.
instructions: Preheat your sous-vide cooker to 160°F (71°C). Cook the chicken breasts for at least 3 hours. Let them rest before slicing into thin strips.
Heat a wok or large skillet with olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced garlic and cook until golden, about 2 minutes.
Add collard greens to the pan, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and stir-fry for 5-7 minutes until wilted.
Toss in herbs and soy sauce, and continue cooking for another minute. Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
For added protein, add sliced sous-vide chicken breasts into the wok while the collards are heating to ensure they cook evenly.
